g.text: 1. Common Knowledge Teacher — Répond directement et brièvement aux claims de

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. Generate Queries (niveau 2) — Génère 1 à 3 requêtes internet visant à vérifier

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: l'information avancée par l'auteur. Adapte ses requêtes en fonction du type du claim

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: (statistical → chercher la source du chiffre, quote → chercher dans les archives de discours, etc.)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Generate Queries (niveau 3) — Génère 1 à 5 requêtes orientées analyse critique :

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: récapitulatif des enjeux autour du sujet, positions politiques des différents partis,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: contre-arguments existants, études ou données éclairant le débat sous d'autres angles...

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Prend en compte le verdict du niveau 2 et les child_results pour cibler ce qui mérite d'être approfondi.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. Web Research (unbiased) — Exécute les requêtes en parallèle et ne retient que les sources

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: les plus fiables : agences de presse, médias reconnus, institutions, revues scientifiques, sites

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: de fact-checking. Renvoie pour chaque source ses metadata et un résumé du contenu pertinent.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. Sources Evaluator — Évalue si les sources trouvées par Web Research sont suffisantes

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: pour conclure sur le claim, en vérifiant leur quantité, leur convergence etc. Si aucun média

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: sérieux n'a relayé l'info par exemple, c'est que c'est probablement faux. Redirige vers

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: "Web Research biased" si les informations sont insuffisantes, ou vers "Synthesizer" si elles le sont.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 6. Web Research (biased) — Exécute les mêmes requêtes mais élargit le spectre aux sources

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: légèrement moins fiables ou plus orientées. Identifie explicitement le biais de chaque source.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Les sites de "réinformation" par exemple restent interdits (ex: Réseau International,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 7. Synthesizer — Produit une analyse de la solidité de l'argumentaire de l'auteur pour ce claim,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: en s'appuyant sur les sources trouvées et les child_results. Si les sources actuelles ne permettent

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: pas de trancher, cet agent détermine via le champ needs_level3 si le claim nécessite une analyse

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 8. Critical Analyst — Grâce aux informations récupérées sur internet, il récapitule le contexte politique

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: du sujet, les contre-arguments principaux, fournit des données complémentaires éclairant le débat. Son

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: rôle n'est plus d'évaluer l'article mais d'ouvrir la perspective pour que le lecteur comprenne les enjeux

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: au-delà de ce que l'auteur a écrit.

text.font-family: Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: * Les différents types de claim, et leurs indices de vérifiabilité associés :

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: For example, "Does the sun rotate around the earth" doesn't need justification today.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Those claims will only go through the fact-checking pipeline, we know for sure we're not gonna need more.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: > factual: a claim about a precise fact, that we can check true/false with data.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: > statistical: similar to factual, but the workflow will need to be more vigilant to the context,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: the sample, the year of study.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: > quote: to know if someone said something, we must focus more on speech archives, interviews etc.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: (pas possible de checker tout un compte insta par exemple...). Le contexte est souvent TRES important.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: > event: events are often mischaracterized (ex: "voted" vs "discussed" vs "proposed"). Must be careful about this.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Those claims will go through the fact-checking pipeline first, but because they are less verifiable or hold other claims

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: implicitly, the generated queries will need to be smarter. Some data exist, some studies have been conducted, but

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: they can contradict, and they may not be enough to settle the debate. It must then push the analysis to the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: level-3 if sources dont converge (or not if the user is in Economy Mode). If they converge, level-2 is sufficient.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: A level-2 conclusion would be "It cannot be decided easily, studies diverge. It depends on criterias A, B, C...".

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: The level-3 answer would explain for example: "The left-wing party leans more towards this, puts more emphasis

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: on this side of the issue, whereas the right-wing..."

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: > causal: Studies exist on the topic, but causality can rarely be proven at 100%. The workflow should assess if

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: there is a consensus or not, if it's only a correlation... Example: "Social networks cause depression among teenagers".

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: > comparative: The workflow must often frame the topic better. Example: "Coffee is more dangerous than alcohol" --> What

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: does "dangerous" mean here? Depending on the interpretation, are there studies proving it?

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: > predictive: An affirmation about the future. It can naturally not be verifiable, but its credibility can be assessed. What

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: are the underlying assumptions, who does it, hare there studies about it? Example: "AI will replace 50% of jobs within 5 years".

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: No fact-checking is possible. A critical analysis can be conducted on the subject.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: > opinion: a value judgment or a political opinion based on beliefs, sentiments, personal values, instead of objective facts.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: For exemple: "Phones should be banned for people under 16" --> It needs to be contextualized, adversary points of

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: view must be explained, backed up by the relevant data/studies.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: The topics that are outside of the editorial perimeter of my platform:

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - all kinds of personal advice (financial, judicial, medical, course of action, personal development...)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - everything illegal ("nazis were not bad" --> Negationism is illegal)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - questions about entertainment, sport, art, pop-culture ("is this movie good?" / "is Mbappe better than Haaland")

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - psychological and relational advice ("how to deal with my toxic boss?")

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - content creation ("write an article/email/video for me")

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: This list is not exhaustive. In the prompt, I will also specify to the agent what IS the accepted perimeter:

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: --> Verifiable or debatable affirmations, political debates, news debates, society debates.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - thesis: The central thesis of the author that needs to be analyzed.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - argument: Supports the thesis. Can also be a sub-argument.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - counterargument: Opposes the thesis or an argument.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Before continuing, we must check that there IS a

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: thesis, that claims support other claims that exist,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: that there is no closed loop.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: It outputs a DAG: Directed Acyclic Graph.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Instructions: Go from top to bottom. First identify

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: the thesis (there should not be a lot of them), then

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: identify its supporting claims etc., forming a tree-like

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Comic Shanns, monospace, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
